# Canberra Vasectomy

> No-scalpel vasectomy by Dr John Deery in Canberra — Experienced, comfortable, and convenient.

Canberra Vasectomy is a specialist vasectomy clinic operated by Dr John Deery, Canberra's most experienced local vasectomy surgeon with over 7,000 procedures performed and more than 800 vasectomies per year, accounting for approximately 90% of ACT vasectomies. The clinic is part of the YourGP network of general practices in Canberra.

## Key Information

- **Phone**: (02) 6103 0434 (10am to 5pm, Monday to Friday)
- **Booking**: Online via [HotDoc](https://www.canberravasectomy.com.au/bookings) or by phone
- **Billing**: Private billing. Medicare rebates processed on the day. Not bulk billed.
- **New patients**: Welcome. No GP referral required.
- **Accepting new patients**: Yes

## Procedure

- **Technique**: No-scalpel open-ended vasectomy with fascial interposition
- **Anaesthesia**: Local anaesthetic only (sedation available for anxious patients)
- **Duration**: Approximately 10-15 minutes
- **Recovery**: Return to work on Monday (procedures done Thursday/Friday)
- **Effectiveness**: Greater than 99.85% success rate
- **Aftercare**: 3 months included, Dr Deery's mobile phone number provided

## Fees

- **Vasectomy procedure**: $911 ($683 out of pocket after Medicare rebate of $228)
- **Initial consultation**: $117 ($73.10 after Medicare rebate of $43.90)
- **Deposit**: $200 (paid at booking, subtracted from fee, refundable with 24 hours notice)

## Locations

### Initial Consultations
- **YourGP@Denman** — 1B Felstead Vista, Denman Prospect ACT 2611 — Monday 3-5pm
- **YourGP@Lyneham** — 1/62 Brigalow St, Lyneham ACT 2602 — Wednesday 3-5pm

### Surgery Location
- **YourGP@Crace** — 1/5 Baratta Street, Crace ACT 2911 — Thursday and Friday

## Practitioner

### Dr John Deery
Dr John Deery graduated from UNSW in 2000. He has recently stepped back from general practice and now provides vasectomy-only services. He performs over 800 vasectomies per year and has been performing vasectomies for over 20 years. John is married to Dr Mel Deery and they have three children. He previously played in the NRL for the Roosters and Dragons.

**Work days**: Crace (Thursday/Friday procedures), Denman (Monday), Lyneham (Wednesday)

## Regional NSW Patients

Patients living outside Canberra (between Parkes, Wagga, and Bega) can arrange an initial consultation via telehealth and then attend Canberra for the procedure only. Telehealth consultations available Monday 3-5pm and Wednesday 3-5pm.

- [Pre-Operation Instructions](https://www.canberravasectomy.com.au/pre-operation-instructions/): Preparation guide

- [Regional NSW](https://www.canberravasectomy.com.au/regional-nsw/): Telehealth options for regional patients
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.canberravasectomy.com.au/privacy-policy/): Full privacy policy

- [YourGP@Crace](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au) — 1/5 Baratta Street, Crace ACT 2911
- [YourGP@Lyneham](https://www.yourgplyneham.com.au) — 62 Brigalow St, Lyneham ACT 2602
